---
title: "Homework 5"
editor: source
date: 04-27-2026
draft: false
---

**Homework 5 is due 5/04/2026 at 11:59 PM. Submit your homework on Canvas as one PDF document.**

The questions were obtained from Modern Mathematical Statistics 3rd Edition

1. Problem 2 on Page 461
2. Problem 3 on Page 461
3. Problem 4 on Page 461
4. Problem 8 on Page 462
5. Problem 11 on Page 462
6. Problem 57 on Page 484
7. Problem 59 on Page 484
8. Problem 71 on Page 494
